headlines.title: White House says Saudi Arabia nuclear deal contingent on joining Abraham Accords
headlines.description: During a press briefing, White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt echoed a social media post from President Trump that said any nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia would be contingent on them joining the Abraham Accords. NBC News' Monica Alba reports from the White House on the potential deal and the White House's approach.

headlines.title: New Concerns Over Oil Prices After Houthis Attack Saudi Tankers
headlines.description: There are new concerns about the future of oil and gas prices after Yemen-based Houthi rebels, backed by Iran, attacked two Saudi Arabian oil tankers in the Red Sea. NBC’s Richard Engel reports on the new front in the Middle East conflict and Christine Romans joins TODAY with analysis on the economic impact to gas prices in the United States.

headlines.title: Member of Vance’s Secret Service detail removed amid probe into alleged compromise of security info
headlines.description: A member of JD Vance’s protective detail has been removed pending an investigation into allegations of compromising the vice president’s security, a Secret Service spokesman said Thursday.

headlines.title: Departures of Senate-confirmed Trump officials are surpassing his first term, new report finds
headlines.description: The report from the Partnership for Public Service tracked 27 administration officials who left their roles without including U.S. marshals, attorneys or ambassadors.

headlines.title: Tropical Storm Bertha Pushes West After Battering Louisiana
headlines.description: Tropical Storm Bertha is pushing toward Texas after crashing ashore in Louisiana. The Gulf Coast was hammered with heavy rain, high winds and floods. Meanwhile, some areas are set to face triple digit temperatures through the weekend. NBC’s George Solis reports and TODAY’s Al Roker tracks the latest forecast.

headlines.title: Video shows an orca torpedoing toward a sunfish, blowing it into pieces
headlines.description: Video shows one orca holding a sunfish by the fin and another torpedoing toward it, blowing it into pieces in the Gulf of California.

headlines.title: FDA Advisory Committee to Review Peptide Restrictions Underway
headlines.description: Peptides are often being promoted by wellness influencers and podcasters as treatments for everything from injuries and aging and now an FDA panel is meeting to discuss whether to loosen restrictions and make them easier to get. But critics say there's not enough data on safety and efficacy. NBC’s medical contributor Natalie Azar joins TODAY to break down the seven peptides being discussed and how effective they are.

headlines.title: We want to hear how Medicaid work requirements are affecting you
headlines.description: If you have lost your health coverage or are at risk of losing it, tell us your story.

headlines.title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada
headlines.description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

headlines.title: House votes to end Iran war, but Senate Republicans vote to let Trump continue waging it
headlines.description: The House approved a nonbinding proposal to end the Iran war, directing President Donald Trump to remove armed forces from hostilities.

headlines.title: Chadwick Boseman’s brothers seek to remove his widow from control of late actor’s estate
headlines.description: Chadwick Boseman’s brothers filed a petition last week seeking control of the “Black Panther” star’s estate, accusing their brother’s widow of mismanagement and failing to distribute the assets.

headlines.title: PT Organics fruit pouches recalled over possible soft strands of plastic in purée
headlines.description: More than 380,000 fruit pouches are being recalled nationwide over concerns they may contain soft strands of plastic in the purée.
